name: baseline-v1-2-train-gate-v2-preregistered
aggregateDatePolicy: Union of inner-validation dates; each as-of date is counted once.
eligibilityPolicy: Feature integrity and regime coverage must pass on unique aggregate inner-validation dates, and at least four folds must pass the operational uncertainty gate.
changeRationale: Separates persistent-regime coverage from short-window operational robustness without changing any numerical threshold.
selectionPolicy: No model parameter, threshold or gate limit is fitted or searched. Outer OOS remains closed until this gate passes.
groundTruthPolicy: NBER is not used by this gate.
